race.comment: JOHNNY CIGAR (8) has been catching the eye with strong finishes and sectionals suggest he will relish the rise in trip. Watch for charging hard late in the piece. HOTINHERRE (3) was too bad to be true last time at Sandown-Hillside when dropping out quickly in the lane after stalking the speed. Form prior reads well and if he can get back to that he will be very competitive. SANDASTAN (6) hasn't won for a long time but is perhaps going a bit better than his form reads. Drops back to a more suitable trip off a nine-day break. Not hopeless on best form. FIORENTE SPRITZ (11) is another that finds it hard to win but was much better last time at Balaklava when sent forward. Expecting her to lead again and give another good sight.
